perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a flat cap and glasses speaks directly to the camera, using hand gestures to emphasize a problem with photo quality. (2) The scene transitions to a screen recording of an iPhone, navigating through Settings to the Photos app. (3) The recording demonstrates toggling the 'Keep Originals' option and the 'All Photos Data' switch within the AirDrop share options. (4) A photo of a Corgi is used as a demonstration subject in the gallery. (5) The man reappears in a circular inset at the bottom right corner while the screen shows the final result with high-quality text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, posing a question about AirDrop quality and transitioning into an instructional tone. (2) Upbeat, rhythmic background music with an electronic beat plays throughout the video. (3) Audible click sound effects occur when buttons are pressed on the phone interface. (4) The music and narration continue together until the end, concluding with a final upbeat flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '為什麼我用 AirDrop' (Why do I use AirDrop) and '畫質怪怪的!' (The image quality is weird!) expressing a common user pain point. (2) Functional Text: '那是因為你這設定沒做' (That's because you haven't done this setting). (3) Functional Text: '點開 設定 > 照片' (Open Settings > Photos) providing step-by-step instructions. (4) Functional Text: '分享 > 選項' (Share > Options). (5) Hook Text: '100% 原味照片啦!' (100% original photos!) in a celebratory tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Problem -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Final Result

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a grey sweatshirt with 'OUTS' text.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A dark, soundproofed studio background for the speaker segments; white/standard iOS interface for the tutorial segments.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a practical technology tutorial designed to teach iPhone users how to maintain full image quality when using AirDrop. It addresses a specific technical frustration by providing a visual walkthrough of the necessary iOS settings.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on built-in OS features for educational purposes rather than promoting a third-party product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature flat cap, glasses, and '3C 有意思 tim哥' branding overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical tech influencer content style with high information density, rapid pacing, and frequent use of emphasis text to maintain viewer retention.
